login.title: Welcome back. Please enter your details.

help.title: Help Center & FAQs
help.subtitle: Find quick answers to your questions
help.q1: What happens if I forget my password?
help.a1: Go to the login screen, click on 'Forgot your password?' and follow the instructions sent to your registered email.
help.a2: After 5 failed login attempts, your account is temporarily blocked. An administrator can unlock it from the control panel.
help.q3: How can I change the language?
help.a3: You can use the language selector at the bottom left of the screen at any time to switch between English and Spanish.
